'''''Stalwart''''' was a [[Victory I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory I''-class Star Destroyer]] commanded by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Maloc]] and used by then-[[Vice Admiral/Legends|Vice Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] as his [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] approximately [[3 ABY/Legends|one year before]] the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==History==
[[File:NL-1_complete.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The ''Stalwart'' over [[NL-1]].]]

From the bridge of the ''Stalwart'', Thrawn supervised the construction of the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] [[NL-1]] in the [[Pakuuni system/Legends|Pakuuni system]] during the [[Battle on the Frontier]]. It would also serve as the base-of-operations for actions against the [[Pakuuni Pirates]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] who threatened the station, success in no small part due to the actions of ace pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].

Following the completion of NL-1, the elimination of the Pakuuni Pirates, Thrawn changed his flag from the ''Stalwart'' to the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Vanguard (Imperial-class)|''Vanguard'']].
